since_last: 26% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.14%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -1.71% · Gold -2.36% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 26% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.14%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.14%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -8.70%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +5.52%, PUBM +4.98%, SKHY +3.58%, CRNC +3.03%, INTU +2.43%. Laggards: TSLA -8.70%, GOOGL -5.80%, SYNA -5.02%, NXPI -4.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.01% at $115.27
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.01% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
